ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Modular: pick a news source + AI summarizer independently. Agentic: a single provider handles both search and summarization.
ast.target: 模块化：独立选择新闻源和AI摘要器。智能体化：单一提供商同时处理搜索和摘要。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where to retrieve news articles from

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: AI model used to summarize retrieved articles
ast.target: 用于摘要检索文章的AI模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unified provider that handles both search and summarization
ast.target: 同时处理搜索和摘要的统一提供商

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you installed this plugin before v1.11.4 and have raw API keys stored in data.json, click to move them into Obsidian SecretStorage.
ast.target: 如果您在v1.11.4之前安装了此插件，并且在data.json中存储了原始API密钥，请点击将其移至Obsidian SecretStorage。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Google Custom Search Engine ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter RSS feed URLs, one per line

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the OpenRouter model ID to use (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5)
ast.target: 输入要使用的OpenRouter模型ID（例如 anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Send a minimal request to verify your API key and model are working.
ast.target: 发送一个最小请求以验证您的API密钥和模型是否正常工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Language for news content and UI elements
ast.target: 新闻内容和UI元素的语言

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 要关注的新闻主题（逗号分隔）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose level of detail for news summaries
ast.target: 选择新闻摘要的详细程度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include analytical section in detailed news summaries
ast.target: 在详细新闻摘要中包含分析部分

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of news items to include per topic
ast.target: 每个主题包含的最大新闻条目数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Total search results to fetch (higher values give more options but use more API quota)
ast.target: 要获取的总搜索结果数（数值越高提供更多选项，但使用更多API配额）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How far back to search for news (d1 = 1 day, d3 = 3 days, w1 = 1 week)
ast.target: 搜索新闻的时间范围（d1 = 1天，d3 = 3天，w1 = 1周）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 要获取的总搜索结果数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Filter RSS items by publish date (d1 = 1 day, d3 = 3 days, w1 = 1 week, w2 = 2 weeks)
ast.target: 按发布日期过滤RSS条目（d1 = 1天，d3 = 3天，w1 = 1周，w2 = 2周）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically generate news briefing at the scheduled time. Note: This will perform background network calls to your selected AI and news providers.
ast.target: 在预定时间自动生成新闻简报。注意：这将执行后台网络调用到您选择的AI和新闻提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to generate daily news (24-hour format, e.g., 08:00)
ast.target: 生成每日新闻的时间（24小时制，例如 08:00）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to store daily news notes
ast.target: 存储每日新闻笔记的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Daily news notes are automatically organized into monthly subfolders (YYYY-MM). Click below to reorganize existing notes.
ast.target: 每日新闻笔记会自动整理到月度子文件夹（YYYY-MM）中。点击下方重新组织现有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notifications when news is generated

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically delete news notes older than the retention period on plugin startup
ast.target: 插件启动时自动删除超过保留期限的新闻笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete news notes older than this period (applies to both auto-delete and manual deletion)
ast.target: 删除超过此期限的新闻笔记（适用于自动删除和手动删除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually delete notes older than the retention period
ast.target: 手动删除超过保留期限的笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add YAML frontmatter metadata to generated news files
ast.target: 为生成的新闻文件添加YAML前置元数据

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加日期时间字段（YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加标签数组（从主题自动生成）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加新闻源/提供商信息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加输出格式（详细/简洁）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a template style for your daily news notes
ast.target: 为您的每日新闻笔记选择模板样式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define your own template using placeholders
ast.target: 使用占位符定义您自己的模板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check if your custom template is valid
ast.target: 检查您的自定义模板是否有效

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to your template note (e.g., "Templates/Daily News.md")
ast.target: 您的模板笔记路径（例如 \"Templates/Daily News.md\"）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copy a template file example to clipboard
ast.target: 将模板文件示例复制到剪贴板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check if your template file exists and is valid
ast.target: 检查您的模板文件是否存在且有效

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use Gemini AI to generate optimized Google search queries (requires Gemini API key)
ast.target: 使用Gemini AI生成优化的Google搜索查询（需要Gemini API密钥）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Let AI evaluate and select the most relevant news items
ast.target: 让AI评估并选择最相关的新闻条目

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional: Custom prompt for AI news evaluation (use {{NEWS_TEXT}} and {{TOPIC}} as placeholders)
ast.target: 可选：用于AI新闻评估的自定义提示（使用 {{NEWS_TEXT}} 和 {{TOPIC}} 作为占位符）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How far back to search (d1 = 1 day, d2 = 2 days, w1 = 1 week)
ast.target: 搜索的时间范围（d1 = 1天，d2 = 2天，w1 = 1周）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cache daily news content to avoid redundant API calls when regenerating for the same day
ast.target: 缓存每日新闻内容，以避免在重新生成同一天内容时进行冗余的API调用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to use your own custom AI prompt for summarization
ast.target: 启用以使用您自己的自定义AI提示进行摘要

ast.target: 你是一位专业的新闻分析师...

ast.source: Move existing daily news files into monthly subfolders
ast.target: 将现有的每日新闻文件移入月度子文件夹

ast.target: 删除超过配置保留期限的新闻笔记

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `parsed` property on `text` blocks is deprecated, please use `parsed_output` instead.
ast.target: `text` 块上的 `parsed` 属性已弃用，请改用 `parsed_output`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Response was truncated due to max_tokens limit
ast.target: 响应因 max_tokens 限制而被截断

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Response was paused - turn was too long
ast.target: 响应已暂停 - 轮次过长

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning text from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的文本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning data from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning function calls from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的函数调用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning executable code from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的可执行代码。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning code execution result from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中存在多个候选项，返回第一个候选项的代码执行结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: batches.createEmbeddings() is experimental and may change without notice.
ast.target: batches.createEmbeddings() 是实验性的，未来可能会在不通知的情况下更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: extraBody provided but current request body is a Blob. extraBody will be ignored as merging is not supported for Blob bodies.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 提供了 extraBody，但当前请求体是 Blob。由于不支持合并 Blob 体，extraBody 将被忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is valid JSON but not a non-array object. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体是有效的 JSON，但不是非数组对象。跳过将 extraBody 应用到请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is not valid JSON. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体不是有效的 JSON。跳过将 extraBody 应用到请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Live music generation is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 实时音乐生成是实验性的，未来版本可能会更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: Ephemeral token support is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 警告：临时令牌支持是实验性的，未来版本可能会更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: The SDK's ephemeral token support is in v1alpha only. Please use const ai = new GoogleGenAI({apiKey: token.name, httpOptions: { apiVersion: 'v1alpha' }}); before session connection.
ast.target: 警告：SDK 的临时令牌支持仅处于 v1alpha 阶段。请在会话连接前使用 const ai = new GoogleGenAI({apiKey: token.name, httpOptions: { apiVersion: 'v1alpha' }});。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` is deprecated, please set the fields on `LiveConnectConfig` directly. This will become an error in a future version (not before Q3 2025).
ast.target: 设置 `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` 已弃用，请直接在 `LiveConnectConfig` 上设置字段。这将在未来版本（不早于 2025 年第三季度）中成为错误。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid maximumRemoteCalls value provided for automatic function calling. Disabled automatic function calling. Please provide a valid integer value greater than 0. maximumRemoteCalls provided:
ast.target: 为自动函数调用提供的 maximumRemoteCalls 值无效。已禁用自动函数调用。请提供一个大于 0 的有效整数值。提供的 maximumRemoteCalls：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Interactions usage is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 交互功能是实验性的，未来版本可能会更改。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Client level httpOptions.extraBody is not supported by the interactions client and will be ignored.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 客户端级别的 httpOptions.extraBody 不受交互客户端支持，将被忽略。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已打开今日新闻简报（备用方法）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to open news file. Try opening it manually.
ast.target: 无法打开新闻文件。请尝试手动打开。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No legacy API keys found to migrate.
ast.target: 未找到需要迁移的旧版 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid time format. Please use HH:MM (e.g., 08:00).
ast.target: 时间格式无效。请使用 HH:MM 格式（例如 08:00）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 模板示例已复制到剪贴板！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AI search query generation requires a Gemini API key. Please add it in the API Keys section.
ast.target: AI 搜索查询生成需要 Gemini API 密钥。请在 API 密钥部分添加。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid language code. Please enter a valid ISO 639-1 code (e.g., 'en', 'fr').
ast.target: 语言代码无效。请输入有效的 ISO 639-1 代码（例如 'en', 'fr'）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AI search queries are enabled but no Gemini API key is set — feature will be skipped. Add your key in Settings.
ast.target: AI 搜索查询已启用，但未设置 Gemini API 密钥 — 该功能将被跳过。请在设置中添加您的密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Daily news already generated for today.

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 创建归档文件夹失败。无法创建笔记。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 生成新闻失败。已创建错误笔记。

ast.target: 生成新闻失败。无法创建错误笔记。

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate news briefing. No note was created.
ast.target: 生成新闻简报失败。未创建任何笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Archive folder not found. Nothing to reorganize.
ast.target: 未找到归档文件夹。没有可重新组织的内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No daily news files found to reorganize.
ast.target: 未找到可重新组织的每日新闻文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to reorganize notes. Check console for details.
ast.target: 重新组织笔记失败。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.source: Add RSS feed URLs (one per line). The plugin will fetch news from these feeds and filter by topic.
ast.target: 添加 RSS 订阅源 URL（每行一个）。插件将从这些订阅源获取新闻并按主题筛选。
